details: The agent successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html, retrieved the actual page content via a snapshot, and accurately reported the first sentence of the text content ('Availing himself of the mild, summer-cool weather...'). The agent correctly identified the page heading as 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick' and reported the first sentence of the body text precisely as it appeared on the page. While the known facts mention 'Avast!' as an expected start, the agent's snapshot shows the page actually served a different Moby Dick passage at the time of retrieval, and the agent correctly reported what was actually on the page rather than hallucinating.
